name: Entertainment Arts, Inc.
summary: Entertainment Arts Inc. owns and operates three subsidiaries including JJS Development Inc., I-Zone Inc., and Song Factory Inc. The company's subsidiaries JJS Development offer direct marketing services; I-Zone develops and constructs entertainment and business communication centers and facilities; and Song Factory develops, markets, and distributes karaoke music software products in compact disc (CD) and graphic formats. Entertainment Arts Inc. is based in Orlando, Florida.
